query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A square photograph showing a human face in profile facing right, positioned in the left-central area of the frame. The face appears in warm orange and amber tones, set against a deep blue and indigo background that occupies the right and lower portions of the image. Visible facial features include the forehead, nose, closed lips, and chin. A thin vertical dark line runs near the left edge. The background transitions diagonally from the lighter warm upper-left to the darker cool lower-right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy, soft-focus square photograph of a human face in profile facing right, where intentional blur and extreme film grain have dissolved fine facial details into ambiguous texture. The image is suffused with a sickly orange-amber cast across the subject, set against an oppressive deep indigo-blue darkness with crushed midtones that create a suffocating atmosphere. The profile emerges as a ghostly, semi-recognizable form from warm haze into cool shadow, with a thin vertical artifact near the left edge, evoking unease through its abstracted, degraded presentation.
